title: <div><tt>4. Lyotardian Differend/Paralogy/Paganism (incommensurable language gam
content:
4. Lyotardian Differend/Paralogy/Paganism (incommensurable language games; justice is inventing new rules that break old ones)
5. Kristevan Semiotic Chora/Abjection/Revolt (pre-symbolic pulsional drives that explode the symbolic order from within)
6. Baudrillardian Simulacrum/Implosion of Meaning (the map precedes and murders the territory; we are in the fourth order)
7. Irigarayan Sexual Difference/Mimétisme/Fluid Mechanics (phallic signifier is monosexual; the feminine is unrepresentable excess)
8. Cixousian Écriture Féminine/Jouissance/Vol Thé (writing with the body that steals flight; white ink, laughter that shatters the mirror)
9. Spivakian Strategic Essentialism/Subaltern/Catachresis (the subaltern cannot speak; every claim to represent her is violent appropriation)
10. Butlerian Performativity/Citationality/Trouble (gender, identity, meaning itself is only the compulsive repetition of norms that can be subverted)

Mandatory Structure (follow surgically):
1. One-sentence death-sentence axiom — the most lethal possible formulation of this thinker’s assassination of stable meaning.
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 16 (chunk 16/18)
